landing.heroSub: Build plans, track progress, improve adherence, and deliver results at scale — all from one platform built for coaches.
landing.heroImageAlt: Forma coach dashboard showing clients, adherence and progress
landing.chaosTitle: Everything you need to coach, in one platform.

before.1: WhatsApp threads, scattered and easy to lose
before.2: Workout plans buried in Docs, PDFs and screenshots
before.4: Notes and progress trapped on paper
before.5: Wasted hours. Lost info. Limited results.

after.1: Every client, plan and check-in in one place
after.2: Build and assign workouts in seconds
after.3: Nutrition targets and logs, tracked automatically
after.4: Progress, adherence and photos at a glance
after.5: Save time. Stay organised. Deliver results.

landing.featuresTitle: Run your coaching business from one powerful dashboard.

clients.title: Manage clients
clients.desc: Organise every client, plan and check-in from one central hub.

programs.title: Build programs
programs.desc: Create workout and nutrition plans, then assign them in seconds.

adherence.title: Track adherence
adherence.desc: Monitor workouts, check-ins and results in real time.

nutrition.title: Nutrition & macros
nutrition.desc: Set targets, approve swaps and keep nutrition on track.

messaging.title: Message clients
messaging.desc: Chat, send updates and keep everyone accountable in-app.

secure.title: Secure & private
secure.desc: Built on Firebase. Your clients' data stays private and reliable.

landing.stepsTitle: Coach better. Scale faster. Get results.

1.title: Add & assign
1.desc: Invite a client and assign their plan in minutes.

2.title: Send workout plans
2.desc: Build programs from templates and deliver them instantly.

3.title: Track nutrition
3.desc: Set macro targets and let clients log what matters.

4.title: Monitor progress
4.desc: See who's on track and who needs help — in real time.

5.title: All inside Forma
5.desc: One platform. Everything you need to coach.

landing.showcaseTitle: Designed for coaches. Loved by clients.

showcase.mobile: Everything your clients need — on mobile.
showcase.dashboard: Manage and scale from one dashboard.
showcase.flow: From the first plan to lasting results.
showcase.clarity: From scattered tools to one platform.

landing.benefitsTitle: Built to grow your coaching business.
landing.ctaTitle: Scale your coaching business with Forma.
landing.ctaSub: Save time, stay organised, and deliver better results for every client.

onboard.intro: Set up your profile to get started, or sign in to restore your data.

common.confirmDeleteGeneric: Delete this? This can't be undone.

bulk.confirmDelete: Delete {{n}} selected item(s)? This can't be undone.

starter.confirm: This adds a full starter set of exercises, foods, food groups and workout templates — all editable or removable later. Continue?
starter.loaded: Added {{exercises}} exercises, {{foods}} foods, {{groups}} food groups and {{templates}} templates.
starter.emptyHint: Load 100+ exercises, common foods, food-alternative groups and starter templates — then make them your own.

cardio.title: Cardio & Steps
cardio.setupHint: Distance and calories are estimated from your speed and incline — you can edit them when you finish.

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.notifWhileOpen: Your browser only shows reminders while the app is open.
settings.localOnly: Running locally. Add Firebase keys to enable cloud sync.
settings.forceUpdateConfirm: Reload to get the latest version. Your data, downloaded videos and login are kept.
settings.clearDayConfirm: Delete all data logged for {{date}} (workout, food, cardio, weight, photos)?
settings.resetConfirm: This erases ALL local data and restores the default plan. This cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.resetOffline: You're offline — your cloud backup won't be cleared and may restore data when you reconnect. Connect to the internet for a full reset.
settings.storagePersisted: Offline storage is protected — your data, videos & photos persist.
settings.storageAtRisk: Install the app (Add to Home Screen) so your data isn't cleared when closed.

video.title: Video Manager
video.offlineHint: Save all clips so they play without internet.
video.missingFile: No video file found for this exercise yet. Add a matching .mp4 to public/exercise_videos/.
video.offlineNeedsDownload: You're offline and this clip isn't saved yet. Connect once and tap "Download all" in Video Manager to use it offline.
video.fallback: This source can't be saved offline. Open it online, or paste a direct video file (.mp4) URL.

import.title: Import Data
import.help: Paste exported sheet rows or the video-links JSON, preview, then import.

measure.title: Measurements
measure.empty: No measurements yet — add them to track changes over time.

gt.noRecords: No records yet — finish a workout to set your first PR.

auth.intro: Sign in to access your Forma dashboard.
auth.pwHint: At least 8 characters and one number.
auth.pwTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.pwNeedsNumber: Password must include at least one number.
auth.reloginNeeded: Please sign out and back in, then try again.
auth.mustChangeBody: Your coach created this account with a temporary password. Set your own now to keep it secure.
auth.completeBody: Please add your phone number to continue — your coach uses it to reach you.
auth.pendingBody: Your account is awaiting approval. You'll get access as soon as an administrator activates it.
auth.suspendedBody: Your account is currently suspended. Please contact support if you think this is a mistake.

roleHint.client: Track your training with your coach.
roleHint.coach: Manage your clients and start a free trial.

platform.signOutConfirm: Sign out of Forma on this device?

coach.notePlaceholder: Write a note for this client…
coach.broadcastHint: Sends a note to all {{n}} of your clients.
coach.addClientHint: Create the client's account. Share the email and temporary password so they can log in.
coach.noPlanAssigned: No plan assigned — tap to create
coach.profileOptional: Profile (optional — the client can complete it later)

coachEditor.cardioHint: Prescribe cardio sessions. Daily minute/step targets are set under Targets.
coachEditor.setsHint: Set warm-up and working sets independently. 0 working = warm-up/mobility only.
coachEditor.noOtherSections: No other sections in this day
coachEditor.emptySections: Add a section like Chest, Back, or Legs
coachEditor.emptyExercises: Add an exercise from your library
coachEditor.unsavedBody: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?
coachEditor.saveFailed: Couldn't save. Check your permissions and try again.

coachLib.loadStarterConfirm: Add 90+ ready-made exercises (muscles, equipment & instructions) to your library? You can edit or delete any of them.
coachLib.title: Library
coachLib.tagsPlaceholder: Add a tag and press Enter

coachFoods.groupsHint: Groups of interchangeable foods clients may swap between.

nutritionSub.noApproved: No approved alternatives for this item.

adminCoaches.title: Coaches
adminCoaches.confirmSuspend: Suspend this coach? They lose access until reactivated.

workoutTemplate.title: Workout templates
workoutTemplate.assignHint: Assigning snapshots this template into the client's plan. Later edits to either are independent.
workoutTemplate.empty: No templates yet — create one to reuse across clients

planVersions.title: Version history
planVersions.saveAsVersionHint: Snapshots the current plan as a numbered version and makes it active. The client immediately sees this version.
planVersions.confirmRestore: Restore version {{n}} as the client's active plan?

upload.badType: Unsupported file type. Use JPG, PNG, or WebP.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.none: No subscription set — tap Set term to start.
subscription.confirmFreeze: Freeze this client's account? They won't be able to use the app until you unfreeze it.
subscription.confirmTrash: Move this client to Trash? They lose access to the app. An admin handles permanent deletion.
subscription.statusError: Couldn't change account status. Make sure the latest security rules are deployed.
subscription.deleteHint: Permanent deletion is handled by an admin.
subscription.requestHint: Ask your coach to pause your subscription.
subscription.requestPending: Freeze request pending — your coach will review it.
subscription.bannerFrozen: Your subscription is paused. Plans are read-only — contact your coach.
subscription.bannerEnded: Your subscription has ended. Contact your coach to renew.
subscription.bannerExpired: Your subscription has expired. Plans are read-only — contact your coach to renew.
subscription.bannerCancelled: Your subscription was cancelled. Plans are read-only — contact your coach.
subscription.confirmCancel: Cancel this client's subscription? Their plans become read-only.
subscription.pendingBody: Your coach is setting up your subscription. You'll get full access as soon as it's active. In the meantime you can message your coach.
subscription.requestDatesHint: Choose the dates you'd like to pause your subscription.
subscription.editDatesHint: Adjust the freeze dates before accepting.

checkin.title: Weekly Check-In
checkin.coachHint: Request, review and track weekly check-ins.
checkin.requiredBody: Your coach requested a check-in — tap to complete it.
checkin.awaitingClient: Waiting for the client to submit.

clientCoach.title: Your coach
clientCoach.signedOut: Sign in to see updates from your coach.
clientCoach.noNotes: No notes from your coach yet
clientCoach.waiting: Waiting for your coach to assign your plan.
clientCoach.waitingWorkout: Your coach hasn't assigned a workout plan yet.
clientCoach.waitingNutrition: Your coach hasn't assigned a nutrition plan yet.

assessment.title: Client assessment
assessment.doneBody: Your information has been submitted successfully and is now available to your coach.
assessment.coachNotesPlaceholder: Notes for yourself about this client's assessment…
assessment.confirmReset: Re-open this assessment for the client to edit and resubmit?

help.0: Tell us a little about yourself.
help.3: Your experience and where you train.

assessment.goalPrioritiesHint: Tap goals in order of importance.
assessment.mustHave: Foods you don't want to give up
assessment.medicalQ: Do you have any medical conditions?
assessment.commitmentQ: How committed are you to reaching your goal?
assessment.photosHint: Optional — add progress photos so your coach can track changes.

admin.noExpiring: No trials expiring in the next 7 days.
admin.pricingNote: Tier prices are tracking placeholders — Forma has no payment gateway.
admin.approveApplies: Approving applies the requested plan automatically.
admin.confirmDelete: Permanently delete {{name}}'s account record? This can't be undone.
admin.deleteHint: Removes the identity record only; sign-in and stored data are handled separately.
admin.cannotEditSuper: You don't have permission to manage this account.

invite.subTitle: Client subscription
invite.title: Join your coach
invite.intro: Set a password to create your account.
invite.fromCoach: {{coach}} invited you to train with them.
invite.invalidBody: This invite link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
invite.panelHint: Generate a one-time link to invite a client. They set their own password and are added to you automatically.

coachTrial.limitBody: You've reached your plan limit of {{max}} clients. Upgrade to add more.

coachPlan.title: My plan
coachPlan.reason: Tell us what you need (more clients, a higher tier…)
